_note: Pre-written EN/ES creative copy for the Mission bilingual demo moment (§13.5). Doubles as the Creative Director's deterministic fallback for Volt on sf-mission-24th (PRD §5: canned copy templates so the app never dead-ends). Text is overlaid in HTML, never in the image (§5). imageUrl fills in after GMI image gen; imagePrompt is the gen input. Spanish is native SF Mission Spanglish, not a literal translation (§12 risk).

concepts.headline: Park Nothing. Ride the Mission.
concepts.imagePrompt: wide-format billboard ad art, sleek electric commuter bike on a Mission District street at golden hour, colorful mural wall backdrop, warm cinematic tones, no text, no words, 1024x512
concepts.rationale: Commuter-first hook for car-free Mission riders; parking pain, instant unlock.

concepts.headline: El Mission se mueve en Volt.
concepts.subline: Sin gas, sin parking — puro flow.
concepts.imagePrompt: wide-format billboard ad art, electric commuter bike parked outside a Mission taqueria, papel picado and mural colors, warm evening light, no text, no words, 1024x512
concepts.rationale: Local Spanglish leaning on Mission pride and daily flow, not a literal translation.
